## Slugs requiring acknowledgement

### `doc-impl-mismatch`

For every modified source file with XML docs, inline comments, PR description text, or README claims: read each prose claim and verify the surrounding code actually does what the prose says.

Canonical rule definition: see `pattern-catalog.md` row `doc-impl-mismatch`.

## Acknowledgement template (per-slug)

```yaml
core_rules_acknowledged:
  - slug: <slug>
    status: <applied | not-applicable>
    evidence:
      per_site_citations:
        - file: <path>
          line: <int or range>
          disposition: <rename | extract | remove | restore | keep-because>
          keep_reason: <≤12 words; MUST add information beyond comment text>
      diff_metric_check: <rg-violation count vs per_site_citations count>
    rationale: <≤30 words; required for not-applicable>
```
